generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted encoder providing high‑precision position feedback for each axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorPosition
]

instance DownstreamEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Downstream encoder mounted after the gear train to further reduce measurement uncertainty for each axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedMotorPosition
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical current sensor delivering time‑series of input motor current for each drive."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedCurrent
]

instance AngularPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the output angular position of each joint, sampled at real‑time control rates."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DataTransmittedAngularPosition
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data transmitted)
instance DataTransmittedMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, DownstreamEncoder
]

instance DataTransmittedCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DataTransmittedAngularPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularPositionSensor
]

// C10: Data artifacts
instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated positional trace (motor and downstream encoders) used for model calibration and validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedMotorPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor electric current collected for health monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "High‑frequency angular position measurements used for closed‑loop control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTransmittedAngularPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling & infrastructure)
instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) offering semantic data exchange between the robot and its digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService,
                     RealTimeJointStateMonitoringService,
                     WearPredictionService,
                     TrajectoryOptimizationService,
                     ClosedLoopControlAssistanceService,
                     VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SysMLModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling environment handling requirements, functional and logical architectures."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService,
                     RealTimeJointStateMonitoringService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink engine executing multi‑physics simulations of robot dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService,
                     TrajectoryOptimizationService
]

instance MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware synchronising data streams between physical sensors, AAS, and simulation tools."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeJointStateMonitoringService,
                     WearPredictionService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualising real‑time state, analytics and maintenance alerts."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

// C6: Services offered by the Digital Twin
instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously identifies joint friction parameters using multi‑physics aware models."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightFrictionParameterEstimation
]

instance RealTimeJointStateMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time monitoring of joint positions, velocities, and torques."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightRealTimeJointState
]

instance WearPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts wear progression on joints based on accumulated friction and usage data."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightWearPrediction
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises robot trajectories for accuracy, efficiency and reduced wear."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionOptimizeTrajectory
]

instance ClosedLoopControlAssistanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assists closed‑loop control by supplying corrected set‑points derived from twin predictions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionAssistClosedLoopControl
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays interactive visualisation of robot state, analytics and maintenance alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionDisplayVisualization
]

// C17: Insights & Actions
instance InsightFrictionParameterEstimation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated friction coefficients for each joint enabling compensation in control loops."
]

instance InsightRealTimeJointState : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current joint positions, velocities and torques available to operators and maintenance engineers."
]

instance InsightWearPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected wear levels indicating upcoming maintenance needs."
]

instance ActionOptimizeTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates optimized motion plans to improve repeatability and minimise energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActionAssistClosedLoopControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Supplies corrected control commands to the SINUMERIK 840D controller for improved accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActionDisplayVisualization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updates the web dashboard with real‑time analytics and alerts."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Model artifacts
instance SysMLRequirementsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML requirements diagram capturing functional and performance requirements of the robot twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance SysMLFunctionalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram representing functional decomposition of the robot system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance SysMLLogicalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML internal block diagram detailing logical components and interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance ACMEArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME description of component configurations and connector topology."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State‑machine based automaton defining behavioral logic of robot controllers."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink multi‑physics model simulating robot kinematics, dynamics and actuator behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionIdentificationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box analytical model used to estimate joint friction from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance MachineLearningRegressorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box machine‑learning regressor providing torque predictions based on historical data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

// C2: Acting Components (physical)
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor driving each robot axis, rated for high speed and torque."
]

instance CycloidalGear : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear in the transmission providing high reduction and precise positional resolution."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear train coupling motor output to the robot joint, including cycloidal gear."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller offering Ethernet/IP/fieldbus interfaces, safety limits and motion‑control functions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system is orchestrated using the Digital Shadow Reference Model, which defines processing components that consume input data traces, apply engineering, simulation, or calculation models, and produce output traces. A concrete realization maps reference concepts to concrete classes (e.g., via SysML class diagrams), ensuring conformance and traceability across the pipeline. Component integration follows MBSE practices, with resource management handled by the processing components' orchestration layer, and system‑wide coordination realized through explicit traceability associations and the “originates‑from” relation linking data traces to their generating components and models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The documents outline a four‑level MBSE lifecycle for a Digital Twin: (1) Requirements stage where functional needs are captured; (2) Functional‑architecture stage modelled with SysML IBDs or ADLs (ACME, AADL, MontiArc) describing components and interfaces; (3) Logical‑architecture stage where logical components, connectors and behavior (state machines, MontiArc Automaton) are defined; (4) Product/technical layer where concrete engineering models, simulation models (MATLAB/Simulink) and code (C++, Java) are instantiated. Transition between stages is managed by traceability links (the “originates‑from” association) that bind data traces to the processing component and the models that generated them, ensuring governance through the reference model’s conformance relation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is addressed by combining physics‑based (white‑box) models—implemented in Simulink—and data‑driven (black‑box) models such as machine‑learning approaches, allowing cross‑validation between simulated outputs and measured sensor data. The approach stresses traceability of transformations (e.g., from SysML specifications to simulation models) to support verification of model correctness. Uncertainty and error sources are acknowledged through the need for verification of the underlying models and the transformations applied to the data, and quality assurance is achieved by maintaining explicit traceability links and by comparing simulated and measured data to detect deviations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin leverages established industry modelling standards: SysML is used for requirements and functional architecture modelling, while UML class diagrams represent the Digital Shadow Reference Model (Section II.B). Reference models and their conformance relations are defined according to the formalism described in [41], ensuring that concrete realizations adhere to the specified domain concepts. These standards facilitate interoperability among heterogeneous tools (e.g., Simulink, C++, Java) and support integration of additional standards such as Asset Administration Shells where applicable, although specific certification or compliance frameworks are not enumerated in the provided excerpts."
]
